SocialHub.title: Social Media Hub
SocialHub.subtitle: Manage your social media connections and posts.
SocialHub.connect_meta_desc: Connect your pages and professional accounts to post directly. Ensure your Instagram professional account is linked to a Facebook page.
SocialHub.connect_tiktok_desc: Connect your TikTok account to schedule and publish videos directly.
SocialHub.beta_alert: Direct integration with Instagram and TikTok is currently under development and platform approval (Private Beta). The feature will be rolled out publicly soon.

LandingPage.hero_description: Every captain needs a compass. Not scattered tools. RiveHub unifies your operations, protects your margins, and navigates your crew through the chaos of daily service.
LandingPage.hero_bg_alt: Professional fine dining kitchen with team in service
LandingPage.features_card1_desc: AI analyses your temperature logs and proposes suggestions for anomalies, to be validated by your team.
LandingPage.features_card2_desc: Intelligent reading of your floor staff notes.
LandingPage.features_card3_desc: The interface instantly adapts to the native language of your kitchen brigade.
LandingPage.philosophy_bg_alt: Organic texture of a fine dining restaurant interior
LandingPage.philosophy_intro: Running a restaurant today is like captaining a ship through fog — without instruments, you're guessing.
LandingPage.philosophy_vision: RiveHub is the compass that turns uncertainty into course corrections.
LandingPage.philosophy_pillar1_title: Amplify your expertise — across every deck
LandingPage.philosophy_pillar1_desc: RiveHub doesn't replace your expertise — it amplifies it with data and broadcasts it to every crew member in {count} languages. No barriers aboard.
LandingPage.philosophy_pillar2_title: Silent profit leaks in rough waters
LandingPage.philosophy_pillar2_desc: Every missing data point is a leak below the waterline. RiveHub's sonar makes it visible before you take on water.
LandingPage.philosophy_pillar3_desc: The more you calibrate, the more your vessel learns the waters. It's your intelligence — not ours.
LandingPage.hero_loss_hook: Every day without data is invisible waste.
LandingPage.calculator_title: How much is uncertainty costing you?
LandingPage.calculator_subtitle: Estimate the cost of overproduction without reliable data.
LandingPage.social_proof_banner: Designed for fine dining restaurants in Québec
LandingPage.protocol_desc: Your kitchen's IQ increases with every connection.
LandingPage.protocol_phase1_desc: One button, and RiveHub starts learning your rhythm.
LandingPage.protocol_phase2_desc: Your past sales become per-item predictions.
LandingPage.protocol_phase3_desc: 30 seconds of feedback per day and your system reaches 92% accuracy.
LandingPage.features_card1_ai_suggestion: Check the compressor and move the meats immediately.
LandingPage.features_card3_source_text: Clean the cold zone of the fridges
LandingPage.features_card3_target_text: Limpiar la zona fría de las neveras
LandingPage.nano_banana_subtitle: Discover our four new tools for frictionless restaurant management.
LandingPage.nb_haccp_desc: Build your own audit forms with a swipe. Custom food safety, digitally signed and immutable.
LandingPage.nb_sonar_desc: The Chef dashboard. Track audits, identify kitchen bottlenecks and optimise your brigade training at a glance.
LandingPage.nb_ocr_desc: Got an invoice? Snap a photo. Claude AI instantly extracts quantities, pricing and ingredients. Goodbye manual data entry.
LandingPage.nb_voice_desc: Dictate your prep notes and instructions. Whisper V3 Turbo AI (blazing fast, bilingual) transcribes and categorises for the entire team.
LandingPage.f1_desc: Forget loose notebooks. Crew handovers, equipment storms, and passenger incidents are charted and tracked by AI.
LandingPage.f1_ex1: Log an equipment storm (e.g., "Fridge 2 is leaking, mechanic called").
LandingPage.f1_ex2: Pass precise navigational instructions to the evening crew.
LandingPage.f1_ex3: Track passenger (guest) incidents to adjust course.
LandingPage.f2_desc: Your logbook, automated. From fridge temperatures to fryer oil, RiveHub tracks every reading and flags anomalies before they become sanitary reefs.
LandingPage.f2_ex1: Fridge hits 8°C: suggestion for corrective action "Isolate or discard high-risk food".
LandingPage.f2_ex2: Automatic reminder for fryer oil checks.
LandingPage.f2_ex3: Documented HACCP procedures in case of inspection.
LandingPage.f3_desc: No language barrier aboard. Every crew member accesses the bridge and log entries in their native tongue.
LandingPage.f3_ex1: The chef writes in Spanish, the dishwasher reads in Bengali.
LandingPage.f3_ex2: Recipe cards immediately understood by all new hires.
LandingPage.f3_ex3: Safety procedures acquired regardless of the employee's origin.
LandingPage.integrations_banner: Integrates natively with your POS systems: Toast, Square, SumUp, Stripe, Lightspeed, Zettle...
LandingPage.f4_desc: Your Profit Radar connects to your POS to cross-reference sales currents with cargo costs in real-time.
LandingPage.f4_ex1: Automatically import your sales from Toast, Square, SumUp, Zettle, or Lightspeed.
LandingPage.f4_ex2: Identify "Stars" vs "Rocks" dishes with the smart Performance Matrix.
LandingPage.f4_ex3: Incompatible system? RiveHub's AI natively parses and imports any CSV export.
LandingPage.f5_desc: Stop logging the manifest by hand. AI extracts provisions, quantities, and costs from your delivery slips to keep your charts accurate.
LandingPage.f5_ex1: Photograph a supplier's crumpled invoice upon delivery.
LandingPage.f5_ex2: Granular line-by-line extraction and price variation alerts for ingredients.
LandingPage.f5_ex3: Live and automatic update of your recipes' Food Cost.
LandingPage.f6_desc: Attract new clients with engaging posts of your culinary highlights generated in one click.
LandingPage.f6_ex1: Generate a captivating caption for a Valentine's Day menu with perfect emojis.
LandingPage.f6_ex2: Automatically translate your posts to attract international clients.
LandingPage.f6_ex3: Draft a tempting description for your delivery platforms (UberEats, Deliveroo).
LandingPage.f7_desc: Sync all incoming passengers from Libro, Resy, and Zenchef. Webhooks and automatic polling for real-time headcounts.
LandingPage.f7_ex1: Receive online reservations instantly without manual entry.
LandingPage.f7_ex2: Consolidate arriving guests, cancellations, and no-shows in a single central view.
LandingPage.f7_ex3: Cross-reference client data to anticipate your service volume.
LandingPage.f8_desc: Sonar Analysis cross-references your arriving passengers, sales currents, and maps to automatically generate the prep course.
LandingPage.f8_ex1: Calculate rations for each dish based on exact confirmed passengers.
LandingPage.f8_ex2: Aggregate raw ingredients needed to survive the upcoming expedition.
LandingPage.f8_ex3: Estimate total cargo cost before even raising the sails.
LandingPage.f6_mock_caption: Discover tonight's special menu! A perfectly seared bluefin tuna... ✨ Reservation in bio 👇
LandingPage.tier_essential_desc: The sturdy hull and ecosystem to structure your daily operations.
LandingPage.tier_performance_desc: Your Profit Radar to chart the most lucrative courses and margins.
LandingPage.tier_intelligence_desc: Deep Profit Topography with predictions to steer the fleet autonomously.
LandingPage.f9_desc: Precise tracking for liquids. Manage keg yields, track glass deposits separately, and operate a full micro-brewery production kanban.
LandingPage.f9_ex1: Instantly isolate bottle and keg deposits from your true Food Cost.
LandingPage.f9_ex2: Track exact pour losses (variance) between POS sales and inventory physical counts.
LandingPage.f9_ex3: Manage your beer batches from fermentation to kegging with specific yields.
LandingPage.f10_desc: Read the atmospheric pressure on your overheads. Electricity and water consumption visualised monthly so you can trim the sails before the bill hits.
LandingPage.f11_desc: An eagle's-eye view of your economic flows and powerful algorithms to maximise your profits. RiveHub cross-references every dollar that comes in with every gram that goes out.
LandingPage.f11_ex2: Interactive dynamics of inflows and outflows.
LandingPage.f11_ex3: Granular breakdown of costs to identify bottlenecks.
LandingPage.f3_target_example: Limpia el suelo a fondo esta noche.

CGU.title: Terms of Service — RiveHub
CGU.s1_p1: RiveHub is a software-as-a-service (SaaS) platform designed to **assist** restaurant owners, managers, and food-service professionals in their daily operations through AI-powered tools and data-driven insights. The service is accessible at **rivehub.com**.
CGU.s1_p2: The platform provides, amongst others, the following features:
CGU.s1_l1: **Digital logbook** — AI-powered service note logging, automatic classification, urgency detection, and corrective action suggestions
CGU.s1_l2: **Temperature monitoring** — Recording, trend analysis, and HACCP-compliant corrective action recommendations
CGU.s1_l3: **Menu management** — Menu creation, editing, and publishing with QR code generation and public mini-site
CGU.s1_l4: **Food cost analysis** — Automated margin calculation per dish, ingredient and supplier management, price tracking, and profitability alerts
CGU.s1_l5: **Menu engineering** — BCG-matrix classification of menu items (Star, Anchor, Drift, Rock) with AI-generated strategic recommendations
CGU.s1_l6: **Receipt and invoice digitisation (OCR)** — AI vision model-powered optical recognition to extract data from invoices and receipts
CGU.s1_l7: **Smart prep lists** — Automatic generation based on reservations, historical sales data, and recipes
CGU.s1_l8: **Reservation management** — Multi-platform synchronisation and guest volume forecasting
CGU.s1_l9: **Social media hub** — AI content generation for Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok
CGU.s1_l10: **Variance and loss tracking** — Theoretical vs. actual comparison, waste documentation, and corrective actions
CGU.s1_l11: **Deposits and revenue tracking** — Daily revenue recording and bank reconciliation
CGU.s1_l12: **Accounting dashboard (Le Nid)** — Financial intelligence, net margin estimation, and cash flow visualisation
CGU.s1_l13: **Utility cost tracking** — Electricity and water consumption monitoring
CGU.s1_p3: RiveHub is a **decision-support tool**. It does not replace professional judgment, human expertise, or the user's regulatory obligations under any circumstances.
CGU.s2_p1: In these terms, the following words have the meanings set out below:
CGU.s2_d1_def: The RiveHub platform accessible at rivehub.com, including all its features, APIs, and associated applications.
CGU.s2_d2_def: Any natural or legal person who has created an account on the platform and accepted these terms.
CGU.s2_d3_def: The food-service establishment registered by the User within the Service, constituting the primary workspace.
CGU.s2_d4_def: Language model (LLM) and vision model technologies provided by third-party suppliers (notably Anthropic / Claude), integrated into the Service for analysis, content generation, and data extraction.
CGU.s2_d5_def: Any connection between the Service and an external platform (POS system, reservation platform, social network) via APIs or webhooks.
CGU.s2_d6_def: Optical character recognition — technology for extracting text and data from document images.
CGU.s2_d7_def: All information entered, imported, or generated by the User within the Service, including notes, menus, recipes, images, transactions, and configurations.
CGU.s2_d8_def: A numerical indicator reflecting the calibration level and data completeness of the restaurant within the platform.
CGU.s3_s1_p1: Access to the Service requires creating an account with a valid email address. The User agrees to provide accurate information and keep it up to date.
CGU.s3_s2_p1: The User is solely responsible for keeping login credentials confidential. Any activity carried out under the User's account is deemed to have been performed by the User. In the event of a suspected compromise, the User must notify RiveHub without delay.
CGU.s3_s3_p1: The account owner may invite team members to join the restaurant workspace. Available roles are:
CGU.s3_s3_l1: **Owner** — Full access, subscription management, inviting and removing members
CGU.s3_s3_l2: **Manager** — Access to operational modules and restaurant configuration
CGU.s3_s3_l3: **Team member** — Read and input access based on enabled modules
CGU.s3_s3_p2: The account owner is responsible for actions performed by team members within the Service.
CGU.s3_s4_p1: A 14-day free trial is offered without a credit card. After this period, a paid subscription is required to continue using premium features. Data entered during the trial is retained.
CGU.s4_p1: RiveHub allows connections to external services to enhance its capabilities. The User acknowledges that these integrations depend on services operated by independent third parties.
CGU.s4_s1_p1: The Service supports synchronisation with the following POS systems:
CGU.s4_s1_p2: Transaction data imported through these integrations is used for food cost analysis, menu engineering, and prep forecasting.
CGU.s4_s2_p2: Reservation data is used for guest volume forecasting and prep list generation.
CGU.s4_s3_p1: The Service enables connections to the following platforms for content publishing:
CGU.s4_s3_p2: The User authorises RiveHub to publish content on their behalf only after explicit approval of each publication.
CGU.s4_s4_p1: RiveHub shall not be held liable for interruptions, API changes, data inaccuracies, or malfunctions attributable to third-party services. The User is responsible for maintaining valid integration credentials and verifying the consistency of synchronised data.
CGU.s5_s1_p1: The Service integrates artificial intelligence technologies (LLM and vision models) provided by third-party suppliers (Anthropic / Claude). These technologies are used to:
CGU.s5_s1_l1: Analyse and categorise logbook service notes
CGU.s5_s1_l2: Suggest corrective actions when anomalies are detected (temperatures, operations)
CGU.s5_s1_l3: Translate content across supported languages ({count} languages)
CGU.s5_s1_l4: Extract data from receipt and invoice images (OCR)
CGU.s5_s1_l5: Generate text content and captions for social media
CGU.s5_s1_l7: Generate prep lists based on historical and forecast data
CGU.s5_s1_l8: Analyse food costs and profitability margins
CGU.s5_s1_l9: Estimate financial indicators in the accounting dashboard
CGU.s5_s2_p1: **Suggestions, analyses, and content generated by the artificial intelligence integrated into RiveHub are provided for informational and indicative purposes only.** The User acknowledges and accepts that:
CGU.s5_s2_l1: AI suggestions **do not constitute professional advice** in matters of food safety, regulatory compliance, accounting, public health, or any other discipline.
CGU.s5_s2_l2: AI suggestions **do not replace** the judgment of a qualified professional (health inspector, certified accountant, culinary expert).
CGU.s5_s2_l3: AI may produce **inaccurate, incomplete, or inappropriate results** due to the probabilistic nature of language models.
CGU.s5_s2_l4: **Final responsibility for all operational decisions** — including corrective actions, financial decisions, content publications, and compliance measures — **rests solely with the User**.
CGU.s5_s2_l5: RiveHub **does not guarantee regulatory compliance** of the establishment. The Service is designed to *facilitate* management, not guarantee it.
CGU.s5_s3_l1: **Verify and validate** all AI-generated suggestions before applying them to operations
CGU.s5_s3_l2: **Not rely exclusively** on AI suggestions for decisions affecting food safety, public health, or the financial position of the establishment
CGU.s5_s3_l3: **Maintain the regulatory skills and training** required for staff, regardless of Service usage
CGU.s5_s3_l4: **Report** any clearly inappropriate or potentially dangerous suggestion to the RiveHub team via the support form
CGU.s5_s4_p1: AI-generated translations are provided for reference only. RiveHub does not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or appropriateness of translations, particularly for safety-related communications. Users are encouraged to have critical instructions verified by a qualified native speaker.
CGU.s5_s5_p1: Data automatically extracted from images (receipts, invoices) may contain errors. The User is responsible for verifying the accuracy of amounts, dates, supplier names, and other extracted data before incorporating them into accounting or operations.
CGU.s5_s6_p1: The Intelligence Score is an internal indicator reflecting the completeness of data entered in the Service. It does not constitute an actual performance measure of the establishment and should not be interpreted as an audit or professional evaluation.
CGU.s5_s7_p1: The Service runs periodic automated tasks, including:
CGU.s5_s7_l4: Sending retention alerts and operational notifications
CGU.s5_s7_p2: These automations run in the background and may be affected by third-party service availability. The User should not rely exclusively on automated results without verification.
CGU.s5_s8_p1: AI-generated publication drafts (captions, hashtags, formatting) are suggestions that require User review before publishing. RiveHub disclaims all liability for content published by the User on social media, even if initially suggested by the Service.
CGU.s6_s1_p1: RiveHub collects and processes personal data in accordance with Canada's Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA), Quebec's Act respecting the protection of personal information in the private sector (Act 25), and, where applicable, the European Union's General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
CGU.s6_s2_p1: The Service collects and processes the following categories of data:
CGU.s6_s2_l1: **Identification data** — Name, email address, establishment information
CGU.s6_s2_l2: **Operational data** — Service notes, temperature readings, menus, recipes, ingredients
CGU.s6_s2_l3: **Financial data** — Ingredient costs, margins, deposits, daily revenue, digitised invoices
CGU.s6_s2_l4: **Reservation data** — Cover volumes, time slots, cancellation rates (synchronised from third-party platforms)
CGU.s6_s2_l5: **Transaction data** — Sales by item, payment methods (synchronised from POS systems)
CGU.s6_s2_l6: **Consumption data** — Electricity and water meter readings
CGU.s6_s2_l7: **Loss data** — Variance records, waste, and inventory discrepancies
CGU.s6_s2_l8: **Multimedia content** — Dish photographs, receipt and invoice images
CGU.s6_s2_l9: **Usage data** — Service interactions, language preferences, connection logs
CGU.s6_s3_p1: User Data is securely stored on Supabase cloud infrastructure (Amazon Web Services). Data is encrypted at rest and in transit. The multi-tenant architecture ensures data isolation between establishments.
CGU.s6_s4_p1: Certain data is transmitted to third-party AI services (Anthropic) for processing (note analysis, OCR, content generation). RiveHub commits to minimising personal data transmitted and using only data strictly necessary for the requested processing. These transfers are subject to the privacy policies of the relevant providers.
CGU.s6_s5_p1: Data synchronised from POS systems, reservation platforms, and social networks flows through the APIs of those services. RiveHub only accesses data necessary for the operation of enabled modules and does not store payment credentials of restaurants' end customers.
CGU.s6_s6_p1: In accordance with applicable legislation, the User has the following rights:
CGU.s6_s6_l1: **Right of access** — Obtain a copy of personal data
CGU.s6_s6_l2: **Right of rectification** — Correct inaccurate or incomplete data
CGU.s6_s6_l3: **Right of erasure** — Request deletion of personal data
CGU.s6_s6_l4: **Right to portability** — Receive data in a structured, machine-readable format
CGU.s6_s6_l5: **Right to object** — Object to data processing for specific purposes
CGU.s6_s6_l6: **Right to withdraw consent** — Withdraw consent to processing at any time
CGU.s6_s6_p2: To exercise these rights, the User may contact RiveHub at the address indicated in section 13.
CGU.s6_s7_p1: User Data is retained for the duration of the active subscription and for a period of 30 days following termination, to allow data export. After this period, data is irreversibly deleted, unless legally required to be retained.
CGU.s6_s8_p1: The User retains full ownership of all data entered, imported, or generated within the Service. RiveHub acquires no ownership rights over User Data.
CGU.s7_s1_p1: The RiveHub Service, including its source code, design, algorithms, documentation, and brand, is protected by Canadian and international intellectual property laws. Nothing in these terms grants the User any rights over these elements, other than the right of use within the scope of the subscription.
CGU.s7_s2_p1: The User retains all rights to content entered in the Service (notes, menus, recipes, images, financial data). The User grants RiveHub a limited, non-exclusive, revocable licence to process this content solely for the purpose of providing the Service.
CGU.s7_s3_p1: Content generated by AI at the User's request (social media posts, summaries, translations, recommendations) is made available to the User for commercial use without restriction. RiveHub claims no intellectual property rights over such content.
CGU.s8_s1_p1: The Service is offered at the following tiers:
CGU.s8_s1_l1: **Free** — Logbook, menu editor, multilingual translation, social media hub
CGU.s8_s1_l2: **Essence** — Free features + food cost analysis, deposits, menu engineering
CGU.s8_s1_l3: **Performance** — Essence features + prep lists, reservations, variance tracking
CGU.s8_s1_l4: **Intelligence** — Performance features + accounting dashboard, advanced AI, utility costs
CGU.s8_s1_l5: **Enterprise** — Intelligence features + multi-location management, dedicated support, customisation
CGU.s8_s1_p2: RiveHub reserves the right to modify subscription tier contents. Any changes affecting features included in a subscribed tier will be communicated with 30 days' notice.
CGU.s8_s2_p1: Subscriptions are billed monthly or annually at the User's choice, through the secure payment platform Stripe. Prices are shown in Canadian dollars (CAD) unless otherwise stated. Applicable taxes are added to the displayed amount.
CGU.s8_s3_p1: Monthly subscriptions are non-refundable for the current period. For annual subscriptions, a prorated refund may be requested within 14 days of renewal. Beyond this period, no refund will be granted.
CGU.s8_s4_p1: The User may change subscription tier at any time from account settings. Upgrades take effect immediately. Downgrades take effect at the start of the next billing period, with continued access to the higher tier's features until that date.
CGU.s9_s1_p1: The Service is provided "as is" and "as available." RiveHub does not guarantee that the Service will be error-free, uninterrupted, secure, or fit for a particular purpose.
CGU.s9_s2_p1: Under no circumstances shall RiveHub, its officers, employees, or contractors be held liable for:
CGU.s9_s2_l1: Financial losses resulting from inaccurate data generated by AI or extracted via OCR
CGU.s9_s2_l2: Regulatory penalties resulting from excessive reliance on Service suggestions
CGU.s9_s2_l3: Food or operational losses related to AI recommendations
CGU.s9_s2_l4: Inaccuracies in data synchronised from third-party integrations (POS, reservations)
CGU.s9_s2_l5: Content published by the User on social media, even if generated by the Service
CGU.s9_s2_l6: Service interruptions caused by third parties (host, AI providers, integrated platforms)
CGU.s9_s3_p1: RiveHub's total liability to the User is limited to the subscription fees actually paid by the User during the **twelve (12) months** preceding the event giving rise to the claim.
CGU.s9_s4_p1: RiveHub shall not be held liable for any failure resulting from force majeure, including without limitation: natural disasters, pandemics, conflicts, Internet infrastructure outages, third-party provider failures, or government actions.
CGU.s10_s1_p1: The User may cancel their subscription at any time through account settings or the Stripe billing portal. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period.
CGU.s10_s2_p1: RiveHub reserves the right to suspend or terminate a User's access in the event of a breach of these terms, abusive use of the Service, persistent non-payment, or any activity likely to harm the Service or other users. The User will be notified by email before any termination, except in emergencies.
CGU.s10_s3_p1: Upon termination, the User has a **30-day** period to export their data using the Service's export tools. After this period, data will be deleted in accordance with section 6.7. RiveHub commits to providing data in a structured, machine-readable format (CSV, JSON).
CGU.s10_s4_p1: Upon termination, all third-party integrations (POS systems, reservations, social media) are automatically disconnected. OAuth authentication tokens are revoked. The User is responsible for verifying that connections have been properly removed with the relevant third-party services.
CGU.s11_p1: RiveHub reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Users will be notified of any material changes by email and in-app notification, with a minimum of **15 days'** notice before the new terms take effect.
CGU.s11_p2: Continued use of the Service after the new terms take effect constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.
CGU.s11_p3: If the User disagrees with the modifications, they may cancel their subscription in accordance with section 10 before the new terms take effect.
CGU.s12_p1: These terms are governed by the laws of the Province of Quebec and the federal laws of Canada applicable therein.
CGU.s12_p2: Any dispute arising from these terms or the use of the Service shall be submitted to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of the Province of Quebec, District of Montreal.
CGU.s12_p3: In the event of a dispute, the parties agree to attempt an amicable resolution in good faith before resorting to litigation.
CGU.s13_p1: For any questions regarding these terms, the protection of your data, or the operation of the Service, please contact us at: **support@rivehub.com**

Meta.home_description: Restaurant management platform with AI: HACCP compliance, intelligent logbook, food cost analysis, OCR invoice scanner, menu engineering, POS integration, {count}-language translation. Free version available.
Meta.pricing_title: Pricing & Plans — RiveHub Restaurant Management Software
Meta.pricing_description: RiveHub subscriptions from $59/month. AI logbook, HACCP compliance, food cost tracking, POS integration (Toast, Square, Lightspeed), {count}-language translation. Free plan, no credit card required.
Meta.cgu_description: Terms of service for RiveHub, the AI-powered restaurant management platform. AI policy, data protection, third-party integrations, and privacy commitments.
Meta.ai_page_description: Discover how AI for restaurant management automates food cost, HACCP compliance, menu engineering, and daily operations. Free AI restaurant platform — no credit card required.
Meta.login_description: Log in to your RiveHub dashboard. AI-powered restaurant management: HACCP compliance, food cost tracking, menu engineering, and more.
Meta.signup_description: Create your free RiveHub account. AI-powered restaurant management with HACCP compliance, food cost analysis, menu engineering, POS integration, and {count}-language support.
Meta.audit_description: Get a free AI-powered audit of your restaurant's online presence. Analyse your Google Business Profile, reviews, and competitive landscape in seconds.
Meta.menu_description: Browse the menu for {name}. View dishes, prices, and allergen information.

AIPage.meta_description: Discover how AI for restaurant management automates food cost, HACCP compliance, menu engineering, and daily operations. Free AI restaurant platform — no credit card required.
AIPage.hero_title: The AI platform built for restaurants
AIPage.hero_description: RiveHub uses artificial intelligence to automate food cost tracking, HACCP compliance, menu engineering, and operational decisions — so you can focus on hospitality, not spreadsheets.
AIPage.what_title: What can AI do for your restaurant?
AIPage.what_description: AI for restaurant management replaces manual processes with intelligent automation. From scanning invoices to predicting prep needs, here's how AI transforms daily operations.
AIPage.f1_desc: AI analyses service patterns, temperature logs, and staff notes to surface actionable insights — replacing paper logs with a smart, searchable record.
AIPage.f2_desc: AI monitors compliance checkpoints, flags missing entries, and generates audit-ready reports — keeping your restaurant safe and inspection-ready.
AIPage.f3_desc: Track ingredient costs, detect price anomalies, and calculate real margin per dish — including labour. AI alerts you before costs spiral out of control.
AIPage.f4_desc: Snap a photo or upload a PDF. AI extracts every line item, product, quantity, and price — turning hours of data entry into seconds.
AIPage.f5_desc: Identify your most profitable dishes with BCG matrix analysis. AI recommends menu changes based on food cost, popularity, and margin data.
AIPage.f6_desc: AI translates task instructions, checklists, and menus for multilingual teams — ensuring every team member understands their role perfectly.
AIPage.why_title: Why restaurants are switching to AI
AIPage.why_description: Restaurants using AI for management report faster decisions, lower food waste, and stronger compliance. Here's what changes when you stop guessing and start knowing.
AIPage.b1_desc: AI automates invoice processing, compliance logging, and cost calculations that used to consume entire shifts. Your team spends less time on paperwork and more time on service.
AIPage.b2_desc: Real-time cost tracking and waste detection help restaurants identify and eliminate hidden losses — often paying for the platform within the first month.
AIPage.b3_desc: Continuous HACCP monitoring means you're never scrambling before an audit. AI keeps your compliance records complete, accurate, and instantly accessible.
AIPage.how_title: How RiveHub applies AI to your restaurant
AIPage.how_description: RiveHub isn't a generic tool with AI bolted on. Every feature is designed around how restaurants actually operate — from kitchen to front-of-house.
AIPage.step1_desc: Link your POS (Toast, Square, Lightspeed, SumUp, Zettle), upload invoices, and invite your team. Setup takes under 15 minutes.
AIPage.step2_desc: Within 48 hours, RiveHub's AI understands your cost structure, service patterns, and compliance routines — and starts delivering insights.
AIPage.step3_desc: Daily alerts on food cost anomalies, automated compliance reports, menu profitability rankings, and predictive prep lists — all without manual input.
AIPage.step4_desc: As your restaurant grows, AI scales with you — handling multiple locations, new team members, and increasing complexity without additional overhead.
AIPage.cta_title: Ready to bring AI into your restaurant?
AIPage.cta_description: Join restaurants worldwide using RiveHub to automate operations, cut costs, and stay compliant — powered by artificial intelligence.
AIPage.cta_subtext: No credit card required. Free plan, forever.

BeforeAfter.without_orders: Ordering based on gut feeling, frequent over- or under-buying

BeforeAfter.with_waste: Precise waste tracking with data-driven reduction strategies
BeforeAfter.without_language: Miscommunication with multilingual staff, instructions lost in translation
BeforeAfter.with_language: Every team member reads and writes in their native language — 54 supported

FAQ.title: Frequently asked questions
FAQ.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started
FAQ.q1_q: How does RiveHub integrate with my POS system?
FAQ.q1_a: RiveHub connects natively with major POS systems including Toast, Square, SumUp, Lightspeed, and Zettle. Setup takes less than 5 minutes — just authorise the connection and your data starts syncing automatically.
FAQ.q2_a: Absolutely. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We use Supabase infrastructure with row-level security, meaning your data is isolated and only accessible to your team. We never share or sell your data.
FAQ.q3_q: How long does it take to set up?
FAQ.q3_a: Most restaurants are fully operational within 15 minutes. Connect your POS, invite your team, and RiveHub starts learning your patterns immediately. You'll receive your first actionable insights within 48 hours.
FAQ.q4_q: What happens after the free plan?
FAQ.q4_a: The free Essence plan has no time limit — use it as long as you want. When you're ready for advanced AI features like predictive ordering and automated compliance, upgrade to Horizon or Intelligence at any time.
FAQ.q5_q: Can my team use RiveHub in their own language?
FAQ.q5_a: Yes. RiveHub supports {count} languages and dialects — from French and English to Bengali, Kabyle and Cantonese. Every task, recipe card and safety procedure is automatically translated for each team member. No language barrier aboard.
FAQ.q6_q: Do I need to train my staff?
FAQ.q6_a: RiveHub is designed to be intuitive. The interface is minimal and task-oriented — your team can start using it immediately. We also provide onboarding guides and our support team is available via chat for any questions.
FAQ.q7_q: How does RiveHub handle HACCP compliance?
FAQ.q7_a: RiveHub acts as your automated logbook. Daily temperature checks, oil changes, and staff instructions flow naturally into inspection-ready compliance charts without extra paperwork.

NauticalCommandCenter.title: Your Restaurant is a Ship
NauticalCommandCenter.subtitle: Every captain needs instruments. Not scattered tools.
NauticalCommandCenter.desc: You're navigating with incomplete maps. Suppliers shift prices. Staff speak different languages. Health inspectors arrive unannounced.
NauticalCommandCenter.p1_subtitle: One unified dashboard. Three critical instruments.
NauticalCommandCenter.p1_desc: RiveHub consolidates what used to be three separate tools into one command center — because a captain doesn't use a sextant, barometer, and compass separately.
NauticalCommandCenter.i1_desc: Food Cost tracking via OCR invoices
NauticalCommandCenter.nav_subtitle: Alerts before the storm. Actions before the leak.
NauticalCommandCenter.nav_desc: Margin drop? Prep for 47 covers? Temperature warning? You see it. Your crew sees it. In their language.
NauticalCommandCenter.feed1_desc: Action: Isolate or discard high-risk food
NauticalCommandCenter.score_subtitle: From data chaos to expert calibration.
NauticalCommandCenter.score_desc: You don't need perfection on day one. Build intelligence progressively.
NauticalCommandCenter.iq_desc_2: stage. Connect your POS to unlock Predictive algorithms. Just 30 seconds of daily feedback gets you to 95% accuracy.

ThreePillarsDemo.subtitle: Like a captain needs one command center (not a sextant, barometer, AND compass separately), you need one unified dashboard for Margins, Crew, and Compliance.
ThreePillarsDemo.owner_prob: Your suppliers raised prices by $0.50/kg. You discovered it at month-end inventory.
ThreePillarsDemo.owner_sol: OCR invoice scanner detects price drift immediately. Next time, you know in 5 seconds.
ThreePillarsDemo.owner_b1: Detect supplier inflation before it kills your profit
ThreePillarsDemo.owner_b2: Know your true Food Cost in real-time (not guesswork)
ThreePillarsDemo.owner_tip: Real ROI. Real savings. Real data.
ThreePillarsDemo.chef_prob: Your sous-chef speaks French. Dishwasher speaks Bengali. Safety instructions get lost in translation.
ThreePillarsDemo.chef_sol: Every recipe, every procedure, every alert — in their native language. Automatically.
ThreePillarsDemo.chef_b1: {count} languages supported (French, Spanish, Bengali, Cantonese, etc.)
ThreePillarsDemo.chef_b2: Recipe cards understood by all new hires, regardless of origin
ThreePillarsDemo.chef_b3: Reduce training time by 40% (no language barrier)
ThreePillarsDemo.chef_tip: One recipe. Five languages. Instant clarity.
ThreePillarsDemo.comp_prob: Manual HACCP logs. Scattered temperature checks. Inspector arrives, you scramble.
ThreePillarsDemo.comp_sol: HACCP logs write themselves. Compliance auto-generated from daily operations.
ThreePillarsDemo.adv_bad_end: Three subscriptions, three logins, three data silos
ThreePillarsDemo.adv_good_1: Margin Compass → Crew Lexicon → Compliance Charts
ThreePillarsDemo.adv_good_2: One login, one dashboard, one unified source of truth
ThreePillarsDemo.adv_good_3: Operations and data flow into compliance logs automatically
ThreePillarsDemo.adv_good_end: Crew satisfaction + Margin control + Inspection-ready. In one tab.
ThreePillarsDemo.adv_manifesto_start: RiveHub isn't three tools shoved together. It's
ThreePillarsDemo.adv_manifesto_end: where margin data, crew communication, and compliance documentation flow together naturally.
ThreePillarsDemo.cta_desc: Choose your path. Start at your current Intelligence Score. Build progressively. RiveHub grows with your kitchen's data maturity.
